channel.title: AI Dev Daily
channel.description: Daily 60-minute podcast for developers on the latest AI tools, Claude Code, Codex, LLMs, and best practices.
channel.itunes:author: AI Dev Daily

item.title: AI Dev Daily — Sunday, June 14, 2026
item.description: Good morning, and welcome to AI Dev Daily. I'm Alex, and today is Sunday, June 14, 2026. We have a packed show ahead today as we dive into some significant shifts in how we approach web-based Python e...
